title: Direct Instruction Design Manual
description: DOK1 Assessment - Direct Instruction Design Manual
author: Zach Groshell
rejectionSubtype: Compound Doc (Design Manual + Project Doc + Reference List)
rejectionReason: Document contains 30+ academic citations but zero statements of what those papers found. All content is prescriptive ("You should...") or operational (rubrics, specs, project scope).
rejectionRecommendation: Convert to brainlift by adding factual claims like "Wouters & van Oostendorp (2013) meta-analysis found games with instructional support produced effect size of X vs. Y for games alone."
